name: UNIVERSAL HEALTH REALTY INCOME TRUST
summary: Universal Health Realty Income Trust (UHT) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that commenced operations in 1986. It invests in healthcare and human service related facilities including acute care hospitals, behavioral health care hospitals, specialty facilities, free-standing emergency departments, childcare centers, and medical/office buildings. As of February 25, 2026, it holds seventy-seven real estate investments or commitments in twenty-one states, with significant lease relationships with Universal Health Services, Inc. (UHS) subsidiaries.
